recommendations.title: Tommy Boy
recommendations.overview: To save the family business, two ne’er-do-well traveling salesmen hit the road with disastrously funny consequences.

recommendations.title: Grudge Match
recommendations.overview: A pair of aging boxing rivals are coaxed out of retirement to fight one final bout -- 30 years after their last match.

recommendations.title: My Spy
recommendations.overview: A hardened CIA operative finds himself at the mercy of a precocious 9-year-old girl, having been sent undercover to surveil her family.

recommendations.title: Naked Gun 33⅓: The Final Insult
recommendations.overview: Frank Drebin is persuaded out of retirement to go undercover in a state prison. There he has to find out what top terrorist, Rocco, has planned for when he escapes. Adding to his problems, Frank's wife, Jane, is desperate for a baby.

recommendations.title: My Spy The Eternal City
recommendations.overview: JJ, a veteran CIA agent, reunites with his protégé Sophie, in order to prevent a catastrophic nuclear plot targeting the Vatican.

recommendations.title: 50 First Dates
